expectations.evidence: term_review.md identifies only 34 unique recurring technical terms. This falls significantly short of the 80-term threshold. Glossary has only 35 lines of translated terms.
Does handle 'Planungskonfigurationsstrukturbibliothek' (10x) → 'Planning configuration structure library' correctly, showing proper compound translation
Multiple translation options provided for key terms (e.g., Produktionseinheit: 'Production unit' with note; Planungsverfahren: 'Planning method/procedure')
glossary.tsv exists with 34 lines containing properly formatted tab-separated de→en pairs
Output recognizes this as a production planning system/engineering patent from Robert Bosch GmbH. Identifies core manufacturing terminology and system architecture.
